title: Green Man Unveils Lineup for 2026 Edition
author: Christian Eede
summary:
Wilco, Mogwai, Four Tet and Wolf Alice will headline this year's festival

Photo by Patrick Gunning

Green Man has shared the full lineup for its 2026 edition.

This year's festival, taking place at its usual Bannau Brycheiniog National Park home, will be headlined by Wilco, Mogwai, Four Tet and Wolf Alice. There will also be key appearances from the likes of The Beta Band, Sparks, Cat Power, Anna Calvi, Cate Le Bon and Aldous Harding.

The lineup for the sold-out festival is rounded out by Baxter Dury, Tricky, Maria Somerville, Dry Cleaning, Daniel Avery, Smerz, Marie Davidson, ML Buch, Prostitute, Tony Njoku, Insecure Men, Joanne Robertson, Ben UFO and Jennifer Walton, among others.

Green Man will take place from 20 to 23 August 2026. Find...

The post
full_text:
Green Man Unveils Lineup for 2026 Edition
 
 

 

Wilco, Mogwai, Four Tet and Wolf Alice will headline this year's festival
 
 

 
 

Photo by Patrick Gunning
 
 
 
 

Green Man has shared the full lineup for its 2026 edition.

This year’s festival, taking place at its usual Bannau Brycheiniog National Park home, will be headlined by Wilco, Mogwai, Four Tet and Wolf Alice. There will also be key appearances from the likes of The Beta Band, Sparks, Cat Power, Anna Calvi, Cate Le Bon and Aldous Harding.

The lineup for the sold-out festival is rounded out by Baxter Dury, Tricky, Maria Somerville, Dry Cleaning, Daniel Avery, Smerz, Marie Davidson, ML Buch, Prostitute, Tony Njoku, Insecure Men, Joanne Robertson, Ben UFO and Jennifer Walton, among others.

Green Man will take place from 20 to 23 August 2026. Find more information here.
